meaning: [军]n.机动重返大气层分弹头导弹 ;vi.装备机动重返大气层分弹头导弹
examples: We could play just one game, Marv.

Marv Tarplin, Motown guitarist with Smokey Robinson and The Miracles, has died at his Las Vegas home aged 70.
